title: Jiho Min
text:
This is a space where I share my thoughts, projects, and experiences related to my interests.
I am Jiho Min, a South Korean-American middle school student who is interested in coding, stock investing, and economics. I’ve done a few projects in Python, but I usually code for my own use. I’m also participating as a translator for various websites. I have various and diverse interests in many different fields, and I am always looking for new things to learn.

 🚀 Visit My Blog!
